chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-61 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 12.10.2022 Mr. Altaf Sachal Awan advocate for petitioners. Mr. Nazar Muhammad Memon, Addl.P.G Sindh. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh. ----- Petitioners are seeking protection against alleged harassment by the respondents. Learned AAG and APG undertake to provide protection to the petitioners as and when required in accordance with law. Learned counsel for the petitioners is satisfied and seeks disposal of this petition in the above terms, which is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
